title: City Housing Costs
description: Players must pay housing costs at each city their route visits. This is a per-city operational expense. Housing quality may affect rest and next-day efficiency.
definition-of-done: Housing cost per city visited. Costs vary by city. Optional housing quality tiers. Costs factored into route profitability calculation.
testing-plan: Verify housing costs apply per city. Test city-specific cost variation. Verify integration with profitability display.
